task_completion.description: Read the colocation directive file to obtain Keplerian elements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of ~/Desktop/colocation_directive.txt.

task_completion.description: Create and configure EuroSat4 and EuroSat8 spacecraft.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT GUI showing two spacecraft named EuroSat4 and EuroSat8, or a script defining them with Keplerian elements.

task_completion.description: Configure the propagator settings with the correct gravity model and step size.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT GUI or script showing a propagator configured with Earth Point Mass or J2 gravity and a step size of 3600 seconds.

task_completion.description: Configure the report file to output Cartesian states for both spacecraft.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT GUI or script showing a ReportFile configured to output X, Y, Z components for both EuroSat4 and EuroSat8 to /home/ga/GMAT_output/colocation_ephem.txt.

task_completion.description: Configure the propagation duration for both spacecraft.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT GUI or script showing a Propagate command for both spacecraft set to an elapsed time of 14 days.

task_completion.description: Save the GMAT script and run the simulation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Evidence of the script saved as /home/ga/GMAT_output/geo_colocation.script and the simulation being run (e.g., GMAT run window, message logs, or the output file colocation_ephem.txt being generated/viewed).

integrity.description: Verify the simulation was actually run using GMAT.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GMAT GUI running the mission or a terminal executing the GMAT script, rather than a python script or manually created output file.

integrity.description: Verify the output file is generated by the simulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file colocation_ephem.txt should appear as a result of running the GMAT script, not manually typed or copied from another source.

integrity.description: Verify the script and output files are saved in the correct directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file manager, terminal, or GMAT save dialog should show the files being saved specifically in /home/ga/GMAT_output/.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Directive file path: /home/ga/Desktop/colocation_directive.txt. Script path: /home/ga/GMAT_output/geo_colocation.script. Report path: /home/ga/GMAT_output/colocation_ephem.txt. The output report should contain at least 330 rows of data (expected ~337 points for 14 days at 3600s steps). The distance between the two satellites should vary between ~33.7 km and ~99.8 km (safely within the 15.0 km to 150.0 km bounds).
